page_content: Course Title Benchmark II Track Courses: SOCY100 Introduction to Sociology Track I Requirement: SOCY201 Introductory Statistics for Sociology SOCY202 Introduction to Research Methods in Sociology Track II Requirement: Nine credits from the following list: SOCY325 The Sociology of Gender SOCY335 Sociology of Health and Illness SOCY401 Intermediate Statistics for Sociologists SOCY405 Credits 3 4 4 9
